titles.title: Never Give Up, Jesus is Coming

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are days I know when you get so discouraged, It seems that all hope is gone. But there's only One who can give you courage And strength to carry on.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Never give up, Jesus is coming. It's the darkest just before dawn. Never give up, Jesus is coming. Never give up, keep holding on!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: This old world I know can't last much longer, And sin will soon pass away. But my faith in God simply keeps growing stronger, For Jesus is coming some day!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Never give up, Jesus is coming. It's the darkest just before dawn. Never give up, Jesus is coming. Never give up, keep holding on! Never give up, Jesus is coming.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It's the darkest just before dawn. Never give up, Jesus is coming. Never give up, keep holding on! Never give up, keep holding on! Keep holding on
